title: gymnogramma jamesonioides
intro: Gymnogramma jamesonioides, also known as the fern-like Gymnogramma, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its saponin and flavonoid compounds. The health benefits of Gymnogramma jamesonioides include treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and kill bacteria. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
